text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... What song should I pick for my<n>singing
lessons...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The teacher said it's fine to just pick a<n>song I like,
but I don't know any popular<n>songs...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Songs I like, huh... What about "LOVE &<n>TURF"?
Mom used to sing it all the time.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She said Mama really liked it too... All<n>right, I'll
do that song!
